markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on CheckThat priorities and operational workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/ZuyAG3cPkYsb2S6mmcX6PsVu1F5DjCiQ?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Top Priority: Fix Indexing.** The primary goal is to resolve CheckThat's indexing failure, which is blocking its SEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/ZuyAG3cPkYsb2S6mmcX6PsVu1F5DjCiQ?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [**Prompt Migration is Urgent.** To prevent client quality drops, all Scrunch prompts must be migrated to CheckThat ASAP, starting with high-priority clients like Augment Code.](https://fathom.video/share/ZuyAG3cPkYsb2S6mmcX6PsVu1F5DjCiQ?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [**New Workflows Needed.** The team requires a dedicated engineering POC to automate prompt creation and a clear process for reporting product bugs (e.g., the missing CSV upload).](https://fathom.video/share/ZuyAG3cPkYsb2S6mmcX6PsVu1F5DjCiQ?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
  - [**Strategic Indexing Plan.** To protect the site's authority, only 100–200 high-quality pages will be indexed initially, with a focus on defining their content and template.](https://fathom.video/share/ZuyAG3cPkYsb2S6mmcX6PsVu1F5DjCiQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)

## Topics

### Problem: CheckThat Indexing Failure

  - [CheckThat pages are not being indexed by Google, preventing the SEO strategy from working.](https://fathom.video/share/ZuyAG3cPkYsb2S6mmcX6PsVu1F5DjCiQ?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [The team needs to align on priorities and consolidate communications, which are currently fragmented across multiple channels.](https://fathom.video/share/ZuyAG3cPkYsb2S6mmcX6PsVu1F5DjCiQ?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)

### Solution: Prompt Migration & Automation

  - [**Goal:** Migrate all client prompts from Scrunch to CheckThat to ensure a smooth transition and prevent service quality drops.](https://fathom.video/share/ZuyAG3cPkYsb2S6mmcX6PsVu1F5DjCiQ?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZuyAG3cPkYsb2S6mmcX6PsVu1F5DjCiQ?tab=summary&timestamp=954.0)
      - [**Export:** Use the "Export your current prompts for review" feature in Scrunch (under `Context > Prompts`).](https://fathom.video/share/ZuyAG3cPkYsb2S6mmcX6PsVu1F5DjCiQ?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
      - [**Upload:** The current UI requires manual copy-pasting, as a CSV bulk upload feature is missing.](https://fathom.video/share/ZuyAG3cPkYsb2S6mmcX6PsVu1F5DjCiQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
      - [**Vetting:** No pre-migration vetting will occur to avoid delays. A cleanup process will be developed later.](https://fathom.video/share/ZuyAG3cPkYsb2S6mmcX6PsVu1F5DjCiQ?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [**Automation:** A custom workflow is needed to automate prompt creation, making the process scalable and a key selling point for new clients.](https://fathom.video/share/ZuyAG3cPkYsb2S6mmcX6PsVu1F5DjCiQ?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
  - [**Engineering Support:** The team needs a dedicated engineering POC to build this workflow and fix bugs like the missing CSV upload.](https://fathom.video/share/ZuyAG3cPkYsb2S6mmcX6PsVu1F5DjCiQ?tab=summary&timestamp=774.0)

### Solution: Strategic SEO & Backlinks

  - [**Strategic Indexing:** To protect the site's authority, only 100–200 high-quality pages will be indexed initially.](https://fathom.video/share/ZuyAG3cPkYsb2S6mmcX6PsVu1F5DjCiQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Indexing too many low-quality pages can negatively impact the entire domain's ranking.](https://fathom.video/share/ZuyAG3cPkYsb2S6mmcX6PsVu1F5DjCiQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
      - [**Immediate Need:** Define the content and template for these initial pages.](https://fathom.video/share/ZuyAG3cPkYsb2S6mmcX6PsVu1F5DjCiQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [**Backlink Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZuyAG3cPkYsb2S6mmcX6PsVu1F5DjCiQ?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
      - [**Directory Listings:** A vendor will provide up to 100 listings. The team must vet the list, approving only unique, high-quality domains.](https://fathom.video/share/ZuyAG3cPkYsb2S6mmcX6PsVu1F5DjCiQ?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
      - [**Medium Backlinks:** While no-follow, these links are approved for building initial domain trust.](https://fathom.video/share/ZuyAG3cPkYsb2S6mmcX6PsVu1F5DjCiQ?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)

### Operational Improvements

  - **Communication:** The `#Project Check That AI V1` Slack channel is too noisy for marketing/engineering collaboration.
      - [**Action:** Post bug reports in the channel, but ask engineers for their preferred reporting process (e.g., a Linear board).](https://fathom.video/share/ZuyAG3cPkYsb2S6mmcX6PsVu1F5DjCiQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
  - **Channel Usage:** Use the `#account-strategy` channel for all CheckThat-related discussions.

## Next Steps

  - [**Nika:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZuyAG3cPkYsb2S6mmcX6PsVu1F5DjCiQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
      - Ping Jason and Andy in `#account-strategy` to identify high-priority clients for prompt migration (e.g., Augment Code, Outreach).
      - [Test the prompt migration process with a small account, monitoring for bugs like line break errors.](https://fathom.video/share/ZuyAG3cPkYsb2S6mmcX6PsVu1F5DjCiQ?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)
      - [Vet the directory backlink list, approving only unique domains.](https://fathom.video/share/ZuyAG3cPkYsb2S6mmcX6PsVu1F5DjCiQ?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [**Talal:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZuyAG3cPkYsb2S6mmcX6PsVu1F5DjCiQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
      - [Define the content and template for the 100–200 pages to be indexed.](https://fathom.video/share/ZuyAG3cPkYsb2S6mmcX6PsVu1F5DjCiQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
      - [Identify a dedicated engineering POC for CheckThat marketing initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/ZuyAG3cPkYsb2S6mmcX6PsVu1F5DjCiQ?tab=summary&timestamp=774.0)
  - [**Kyle:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZuyAG3cPkYsb2S6mmcX6PsVu1F5DjCiQ?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
      - [Find the correct engineering contact for CheckThat.](https://fathom.video/share/ZuyAG3cPkYsb2S6mmcX6PsVu1F5DjCiQ?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
